hero.title: AI for Landscapers
hero.description: Your AI virtual assistant helps landscaping businesses manage calls, book site inspections, capture project details, follow up on quotes, and keep jobs moving while you focus on creating outdoor spaces.

stats.label: Fewer missed job enquiries with 24/7 call answering.
Less time spent on admin and scheduling.
Higher quote acceptance with faster follow-ups.

blocks.heading: Modern Solutions for Modern Landscaping Businesses
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that every call to your landscaping business could be a new garden, outdoor renovation, or maintenance job. Our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every enquiry is answered professionally and captured accurately.

blocks.heading: Focus on Landscaping, Not Phone Calls
blocks.description: While you're on-site designing, building, or maintaining landscapes, your AI Receptionist handles incoming calls and questions. It answers enquiries like 'Do you do garden design?' or 'Can I book a site visit?' with a friendly and professional tone.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Landscaping Opportunity
blocks.description: Whether you're busy, after hours, or on another job, your AI Receptionist makes sure no lead is missed. It explains your services — from garden design and turfing to paving and ongoing maintenance — and books inspections automatically.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Capture more landscaping jobs, reduce admin, and deliver a professional customer experience with AI-powered automation.

cards.title: Professional First Impression

whyChooseUs.title: Why Landscapers Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Landscapers across Australia trust our AI Virtual Receptionist to manage calls, book site inspections, and capture accurate project details. It integrates with your scheduling tools and CRM, acting as a reliable extension of your business.

card.heading: Streamline Quotes and Client Follow-Ups
card.description: After each enquiry or site visit, you can record quick voice notes that are transcribed and summarised automatically. The AI follows up on quotes, approvals, and start dates — helping you secure more landscaping projects faster.
